name: Trump Headquarters
subject: Got a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
As one of the President’s top supporters... |
---
| | |

Peter, we don't trust the fake news polls about President Trump so we're coming to our top supporters to know:

**Do you approve of President Trump 's job performance?** [YES](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9929ed304244378872b9b91680e5b7e23f4fbf530652c8bc20193208b6e1a9345b6aaa6dac5e98c5c5db9b6feefa4874) [NO](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9929ed3042443788ba7c9102264aeb60180edad8c1a376dc38501193921216194500f7228d122b338fc07c3dd017cce5)

The President appreciates your input.

**[Please take our Official Presidential Approval Poll to indicate whether you approve of the job President Trump is doing to Make America Great Again!](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9929ed3042443788712cd8803d0adf5bf8d9e2ba4eeec7d0dc5d74d447d2eb31b2f81580e1f3dea5c390c7d49e74356b)**

Thank you,

Presidential Polling
Team Trump

[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9929ed30424437883e4108ea21aff7c61b70adc86caca4551a198a803086c24f61b4e5a51ac1b1e755d9dce021904500)

It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

name: Rapid Response Center
subject: FLASH POLL: Do you want socialized healthcare?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
**Bernie Sanders:** I'm 'absolutely' introducing single-payer healthcare bill
_\- The Hill_
_Do you want a government takeover of healthcare?_
**[Yes](http://click1.action.gop.com/ddmldkpbmngfckckfrwrpfzpszfbssrwlhcrhtzthmsrsh_orztrrmllfw.html?a=17786605) **or [**No**](http://click1.action.gop.com/hhhlhrqdwgnzcrcrzspsqzjqmjzdmmsplbcsbvjvbwmsms_orztrrmllfw.html?a=17786605)

This leftist dream is gaining more traction with the Democratic Party every day.

Even Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer agrees it should be on the Table.

We need to let these extreme leftist Democrats like Schumer and Bernie know that Americans refuse to support a "single-payer healthcare system."

[**Do you support the government takeover of your healthcare?**](http://click1.action.gop.com/fgrcgzspnfqwjzjzwblbswtsrtwprrblchjbhdtdhnrbrj_orztrrmllfw.html?a=17786605)

****[YES](http://click1.action.gop.com/fgycgzspnfqwjzjzwblbswtsrtwprrblchjbhdtdhnrbrn_orztrrmllfw.html?a=17786605)****

_Or_

****[NO](http://click1.action.gop.com/pdfrctqglsfbmtmtbykyqbwqdwbgddykrjmyjhwhjldydc_orztrrmllfw.html?a=17786605)****
